rulings.Case Title: NANCY MARIE SCOTT et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JULY 2, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT EATON ELECTRICAL INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY DECLARATIONS OF VASSALLO, CILIA AND AY. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO COUNSEL'S DECLARATION RE HEIR'S TESTIMONY IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED UNDER BILES. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO AY DECLARATION IS OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ARTEM ILINETS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JULY 2, 2007, LINE 13. PETITIONER ARTEM ILINETS' Petition To Compel Arbitration: THE PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR AND TO ADVISE THE COURT OF THEIR "FINAL" LIST OF FIVE PROPOSED ARBITRATORS. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON ONE FROM THE LIST OF TEN, THE COURT WILL REDUCE THE TWO LISTS TO FIVE NAMES AND UTILIZE C.C.P. SECTION 1281.6 TO SELECT THE ARBITRATOR. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: W.D.BRITTON &CO INC VS. PRINT MASTERS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JULY 2, 2007, LINE 14. DEFENDANT PRINT MASTERS INC. AND JANE BRIONES' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS OVERRULED, FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES AUTHORITY TO SUE; NAMING BRIONES IS APPROPRIATE IN THESE CIRCUMSTANCES; DEMAND FOR LATE FEES IS AUTHORIZED BY C.C.P. SECTION 1161 (2); AND PLAINTIFF PLEADS SERVICE AS REQUIRED BY THE LEASE. =(302/PJM/PB)
